title: Software Expert (CAD and Engineering)
tasks: Record screen sessions demonstrating specific tasks with verbal narration
Annotate screenshots of professional software (bounding boxes)
Use custom capture tool to record workflows
evidence: High-priority data collection initiative to improve AI understanding of complex software interfaces and multi-step workflows.

title: CAD tools Expert
tasks: Analyze, evaluate and enhance workflows used to train AI models
Graphic designing, photo editing, and engineering design tasks
Evaluate workflows step-by-step to improve usability and realism
evidence: Work with leading AI labs to push the boundaries of frontier AI models.

title: Engineering Expert (PhD, Master's, or Olympiad Participants)
tasks: Design original, advanced engineering problems to challenge AI models
Evaluate AI-generated engineering solutions for accuracy and constraints
Identify logical gaps and modeling assumptions
evidence: Collaborating with leading AI research lab to advance engineering problem-solving at the frontier of AI.

title: Expert Model Trainer
tasks: Contribute to projects helping build cutting edge AI products
Domain expertise contribution (PhD, Law, Medicine, etc.)
evidence: Mercor partners with leading AI labs to train frontier models using human expertise.

title: Generalist Expert (Reddit Data)
evidence: Low-tier generalist work paid significantly less than specialized engineering experts.
